intent: buyer searches for a reliable EV charger manufacturer

title.en: EV Charger Manufacturer for Global Charging Projects
title.zh: 面向全球项目的电动汽车充电桩制造商

description.en: How to evaluate an EV charger manufacturer for portable chargers, AC wallboxes, DC fast chargers, certifications, and long-term supply support.
description.zh: 了解如何评估电动汽车充电桩制造商，覆盖便携式、交流壁挂、直流快充、认证和长期供货支持。

hero.en: Choosing an EV charger manufacturer is not only about power range. Buyers need certified hardware, stable firmware, OCPP experience, enclosure options, and a team that can support samples, pilot projects, and repeat orders.
hero.zh: 选择充电桩制造商不只是看功率范围。采购方需要认证硬件、稳定固件、OCPP经验、外观结构选项，以及能支持样品、小批量试点和持续复购的团队。

heading.zh: 制造商应证明哪些能力

body.en: A serious EV charger supplier should show real product lines, certification paths, exported market experience, and engineering support for installation scenarios. This reduces project risk before mass production.
body.zh: 可靠供应商应能展示真实产品线、认证路径、出口市场经验和场景化工程支持。这样可以在批量生产前降低项目风险。

heading.en: Match product range to the project

body.en: Home charging, workplace charging, public AC charging, and high-power DC fast charging have different hardware, software, and service needs. A full-range portfolio makes future expansion easier.
body.zh: 家用充电、工作场所、公共交流桩和大功率直流快充对硬件、软件和服务的要求不同。完整产品线更利于后续扩展。

body.en: YINGLITECH supplies portable chargers, AC charging stations, DC fast chargers, and energy storage charging systems with ODM and OEM cooperation for overseas operators and distributors.
body.zh: 盈利科技提供便携式充电器、交流充电桩、直流快充和储能充电系统，可为海外运营商和渠道商提供ODM/OEM合作。

intent: buyer searches for EV charger OEM or ODM partner

title.en: EV Charger OEM and ODM Manufacturing Guide
title.zh: 电动汽车充电桩OEM与ODM制造指南

description.en: Plan an EV charger OEM/ODM project from requirement definition to sample validation, certifications, branding, firmware, and mass production.
description.zh: 从需求定义、样机验证、认证、品牌定制、固件到批量生产，规划电动汽车充电桩OEM/ODM项目。

hero.en: OEM and ODM cooperation works best when the buyer defines markets, connector standards, enclosure needs, app or platform requirements, certification targets, and order forecast early.
hero.zh: OEM/ODM合作需要尽早明确目标市场、接口标准、外观结构、APP或平台需求、认证目标和订单预测。

body.en: Connector type, input voltage, metering, waterproof rating, and certification needs differ across Europe, North America, and Asia-Pacific markets. These choices affect design and cost.
body.zh: 欧洲、北美和亚太市场在接口、电压、计量、防护等级和认证要求上不同，这些选择会影响设计和成本。

heading.zh: 明确哪些部分需要定制

body.en: Branding can include color, logo, packaging, cable length, connector, firmware defaults, RFID behavior, OCPP settings, and cloud platform integration.
body.zh: 可定制内容包括颜色、Logo、包装、线长、接口、固件默认值、RFID逻辑、OCPP设置和云平台对接。

body.en: A sample and pilot phase helps confirm thermal behavior, installation process, backend compatibility, packaging, and field feedback before repeat orders.
body.zh: 样机和试点阶段可以在复购前验证散热、安装流程、平台兼容性、包装和现场反馈。

intent: operator searches for OCPP compatible EV charger

title.en: OCPP EV Charger for Commercial and Public Charging
title.zh: 面向商用和公共运营的OCPP充电桩

description.en: Understand how OCPP EV chargers connect charging hardware with operator platforms for monitoring, user access, billing, and remote maintenance.
description.zh: 了解OCPP充电桩如何连接硬件与运营平台，用于监控、用户准入、计费和远程维护。

hero.en: OCPP matters when a charger must work with a third-party CMS, payment flow, RFID access, load management, or remote diagnostics. It is a key requirement for commercial and public charging networks.
hero.zh: 当充电桩需要接入第三方CMS、支付流程、RFID、负载管理或远程诊断时，OCPP就是关键要求，尤其适用于商用和公共充电网络。

body.en: OCPP lets operators monitor charger status, authorize users, manage sessions, update configuration, and connect chargers from different vendors to a central platform.
body.zh: OCPP可帮助运营商监控设备状态、授权用户、管理充电会话、更新配置，并把不同供应商设备接入统一平台。

body.en: Protocol compatibility should be checked together with meter accuracy, network module stability, enclosure design, cable management, and field installation requirements.
body.zh: 协议兼容性需要与计量精度、网络模块稳定性、结构设计、线缆管理和现场安装要求一起评估。

body.en: Commercial AC chargers and DC fast chargers are the most common OCPP product lines because they serve shared parking, fleet, workplace, and public charging use cases.
body.zh: 商用交流桩和直流快充是最常见的OCPP产品线，适用于共享停车、车队、办公园区和公共充电场景。

intent: buyer researches DC fast charger products

title.en: DC Fast Charger Selection for Public and Fleet Charging
title.zh: 公共和车队场景的直流快充选型

description.en: Compare DC fast charger power levels, connector options, site scenarios, and deployment considerations from 30KW compact units to 720KW split systems.
description.zh: 比较30KW紧凑型到720KW分体式系统的直流快充功率、接口、站点场景和部署要点。

hero.en: DC fast chargers shorten charging time for public stations, fleets, highways, and destination charging. The right model depends on grid capacity, vehicle mix, parking dwell time, and future expansion.
hero.zh: 直流快充可缩短公共站、车队、高速和目的地充电时间。合适型号取决于电网容量、车型结构、停留时间和未来扩容计划。

body.en: Compact 30KW to 80KW chargers fit limited-power sites and destination charging. 120KW to 360KW chargers support higher turnover. Split systems fit large stations that need scalable power.
body.zh: 30KW到80KW适合电力受限站点和目的地充电，120KW到360KW适合更高周转，分体式系统适合需要扩展功率的大型站点。

body.en: CCS2, CCS1, NACS, GB/T, and CHAdeMO support should be matched to the target market and vehicle base. Mixed connector planning can improve utilization.
body.zh: CCS2、CCS1、NACS、GB/T和CHAdeMO应匹配目标市场和车辆基础，混合接口规划可提升利用率。

body.en: Remote monitoring, payment integration, load control, maintenance access, and spare-part planning should be discussed before site rollout.
body.zh: 远程监控、支付集成、负载控制、维护通道和备件计划应在站点铺设前确认。

intent: business researches commercial EV charging station solutions

title.zh: 商用电动汽车充电站解决方案

description.en: Plan commercial EV charging stations for parking lots, offices, hotels, retail sites, fleets, and operators using AC and DC charger combinations.
description.zh: 为停车场、办公园区、酒店、零售场所、车队和运营商规划交流与直流组合的商用充电站。

hero.en: A commercial charging site should balance user dwell time, available power, payment needs, access control, charger quantity, and long-term operating cost.
hero.zh: 商用充电站需要平衡用户停留时间、可用电力、支付需求、权限控制、设备数量和长期运营成本。

body.en: AC chargers are cost-effective for long parking sessions, while DC fast chargers support short stops and high turnover. Many commercial projects need both.
body.zh: 交流桩适合长时间停车且成本更低，直流快充适合短停和高周转，许多商用项目需要两者组合。

body.en: RFID, MID meters, OCPP, backend integration, cable management, advertising screens, and weather resistance can all affect the final charger selection.
body.zh: RFID、MID电表、OCPP、后台对接、线缆管理、广告屏和户外防护都会影响最终选型。

body.en: YINGLITECH can support project matching across wallbox, pedestal, advertising, compact DC, and high-power DC charging products.
body.zh: 盈利科技可围绕壁挂、立柱、广告桩、紧凑型直流和大功率直流产品提供项目匹配支持。

intent: buyer researches home wallbox EV charger options

title.en: Home Wallbox EV Charger Options from 7KW to 22KW

description.en: Compare home wallbox EV chargers by power, cable type, app control, dynamic load balance, installation needs, and market requirements.
description.zh: 按功率、线缆类型、APP控制、动态负载均衡、安装需求和市场要求比较家用壁挂式充电桩。

hero.en: Home wallbox chargers are selected by installation environment, grid connection, vehicle onboard charger limit, cable preference, and local compliance requirements.
hero.zh: 家用壁挂桩的选型取决于安装环境、电网连接、车载充电机限制、线缆偏好和当地合规要求。

body.en: 7KW models fit many single-phase homes, while 11KW and 22KW models suit three-phase markets and faster overnight charging when the vehicle and grid allow it.
body.zh: 7KW适合许多单相家庭，11KW和22KW适合三相市场，在车辆和电网允许时提供更快的夜间充电。

body.en: App control, scheduling, RFID, dynamic load balance, and solar or energy integration can improve safety and user convenience.
body.zh: APP控制、预约充电、RFID、动态负载均衡，以及光伏或能源系统联动可提升安全性和使用便利。

body.en: Home wallboxes are common OEM/ODM products because branding, packaging, cable options, and regional certification paths can be customized for local channels.
body.zh: 家用壁挂桩是常见OEM/ODM产品，品牌、包装、线缆选项和区域认证路径可按本地渠道定制。

intent: buyer researches energy storage EV charging solution

title.en: Energy Storage EV Charging for Grid-Limited Sites
title.zh: 面向电网受限站点的储能充电方案

description.en: Use energy storage EV charging to support peak shaving, solar integration, high-power charging, and sites where grid capacity is limited.
description.zh: 通过储能充电支持削峰填谷、光伏接入、高功率充电，以及电网容量受限的站点。

hero.en: Energy storage charging systems can buffer grid demand, store solar energy, and support higher-power charging where direct grid expansion is expensive or slow.
hero.zh: 储能充电系统可以缓冲电网负荷、存储光伏电能，并在直接扩容成本高或周期长的场景下支持更高功率充电。

body.en: Storage is useful for peak-demand management, remote or weak-grid sites, temporary high-power charging demand, and projects that combine solar and EV charging.
body.zh: 储能适用于峰值负荷管理、偏远或弱电网站点、临时高功率需求，以及光伏与充电结合的项目。

body.en: Battery capacity, charger power, EMS logic, thermal management, safety design, and maintenance access should be planned as one system.
body.zh: 电池容量、充电功率、EMS逻辑、热管理、安全设计和维护通道需要作为一个系统整体规划。

body.en: For operators, storage can reduce grid upgrade pressure and improve charging availability. For commercial sites, it can make fast charging possible in more locations.
body.zh: 对运营商而言，储能可降低电网扩容压力并提升充电可用性；对商用站点而言，它能让更多地点具备快充能力。

intent: buyer researches EV charging mode differences

title.en: Mode 2, Mode 3, and Mode 4 EV Charging Explained

description.en: Learn the practical differences between Mode 2 portable charging, Mode 3 AC charging stations, and Mode 4 DC fast charging for product selection.
description.zh: 了解Mode 2便携式充电、Mode 3交流充电桩和Mode 4直流快充的实际区别，辅助产品选型。

hero.en: Charging mode terminology helps buyers connect use cases with the right hardware: emergency or portable charging, fixed AC charging, or high-power DC fast charging.
hero.zh: 充电模式术语可帮助采购方把使用场景和硬件对应起来：应急或便携式充电、固定式交流充电，或大功率直流快充。

body.en: Mode 2 usually refers to portable AC charging with an in-cable control box. It fits mobile, backup, and light-duty charging needs.
body.zh: Mode 2通常指带线控盒的便携式交流充电，适合移动、备用和轻量充电需求。

body.en: Mode 3 covers dedicated AC charging stations such as home wallboxes and commercial AC chargers, often with smart control and access features.
body.zh: Mode 3覆盖专用交流充电桩，例如家用壁挂桩和商用交流桩，通常具备智能控制和准入功能。

body.en: Mode 4 uses external DC charging equipment to deliver higher power directly to the vehicle battery, making it suitable for public, fleet, and highway scenarios.
body.zh: Mode 4通过外部直流设备向车辆电池提供更高功率，适用于公共、车队和高速场景。

intent: buyer compares EV charger manufacturers before supplier shortlist

title.en: How to Select an EV Charger Manufacturer
title.zh: 如何选择电动汽车充电桩制造商

description.en: A practical selection guide for EV charger buyers comparing manufacturing capability, certifications, OCPP support, product range, ODM/OEM fit, and long-term supply reliability.
description.zh: 面向充电桩采购方的制造商选择指南，比较制造能力、认证、OCPP支持、产品范围、ODM/OEM适配和长期供货可靠性。

hero.en: The right EV charger manufacturer should match the buyer's target market, power range, protocol requirements, certification roadmap, branding needs, and after-sales expectations. A shortlist should be based on evidence, not only catalog claims.
hero.zh: 合适的充电桩制造商应匹配采购方的目标市场、功率范围、协议要求、认证路线、品牌定制和售后预期。供应商短名单应基于证据，而不只是产品目录描述。

body.en: Voltage, connector, certification, language, app, metering, and installation expectations vary by region. Confirm these requirements before comparing suppliers.
body.zh: 不同区域在电压、接口、认证、语言、APP、计量和安装方面要求不同。比较供应商前应先确认这些条件。

body.en: Ask for tested models, product photos, specification sheets, certification samples, OCPP experience, and reference project scenarios instead of relying on general marketing copy.
body.zh: 应要求供应商提供已测试型号、产品图片、规格书、认证样例、OCPP经验和参考项目场景，而不是只看通用营销文案。

body.en: A supplier is more valuable when it can support samples, pilot installation feedback, firmware refinement, packaging updates, and stable repeat production.
body.zh: 能支持样品、试点安装反馈、固件优化、包装更新和稳定复购生产的供应商更有长期价值。

intent: buyer compares AC and DC EV charger options

title.en: AC vs DC EV Charger: How to Choose
title.zh: 交流充电桩与直流充电桩如何选择

description.en: Compare AC and DC EV chargers by charging speed, installation cost, grid demand, user dwell time, operation model, and best-fit scenarios.
description.zh: 从充电速度、安装成本、电网需求、用户停留时间、运营模式和适用场景比较交流与直流充电桩。

hero.en: AC chargers are usually the economical choice for long parking sessions, while DC chargers are selected when turnaround time and high utilization matter. Many sites need both.
hero.zh: 交流桩通常适合长时间停车和成本敏感场景，直流桩适合需要快速周转和高利用率的场景。很多站点需要两者组合。

body.en: Homes, offices, hotels, and workplace parking often benefit from AC charging because vehicles remain parked for hours and hardware cost is lower.
body.zh: 家庭、办公园区、酒店和工作场所通常适合交流充电，因为车辆停留时间较长，硬件成本也更低。

body.en: Public charging, fleet depots, highway sites, and taxi or logistics operations often need DC charging because drivers value short charging sessions.
body.zh: 公共充电、车队场站、高速服务区、出租车和物流运营通常需要直流快充，因为司机更重视短时间补能。

heading.zh: 用户行为复杂时组合使用

body.en: Mixed charging sites can use AC chargers for parked users and DC chargers for urgent charging, improving asset utilization across different user groups.
body.zh: 混合站点可用交流桩服务长停用户，用直流桩服务急需补能用户，从而提升不同人群下的资产利用率。

intent: buyer compares EV charging connector standards

title.en: CCS2, CCS1, NACS, GB/T, and CHAdeMO Connector Guide

description.en: Understand how major EV charging connector standards differ by region, vehicle base, power class, and charging station planning needs.
description.zh: 了解主要电动汽车充电接口标准在区域、车型基础、功率等级和充电站规划方面的差异。

hero.en: Connector planning affects charger compatibility, utilization, export compliance, and future station expansion. Buyers should choose connector options by target vehicle mix, not by global popularity alone.
hero.zh: 接口规划会影响设备兼容性、利用率、出口合规和站点扩容。采购方应按目标车型结构选择接口，而不是只看全球流行度。

body.en: CCS2 is common in Europe, CCS1 and NACS are important in North America, GB/T serves China, and CHAdeMO may remain relevant for certain legacy fleets.
body.zh: CCS2常见于欧洲，CCS1和NACS对北美重要，GB/T服务中国市场，CHAdeMO在部分存量车队中仍可能相关。

body.en: A multi-standard station can serve more drivers, but it also increases planning complexity for cable management, power allocation, spare parts, and maintenance.
body.zh: 多标准站点能服务更多司机，但也会增加线缆管理、功率分配、备件和维护复杂度。

body.en: Some markets are transitioning connector preferences. Buyers should discuss modular cable design and replacement paths before large station rollout.
body.zh: 部分市场正在发生接口偏好迁移。大规模铺设前，采购方应讨论模块化线缆设计和后续替换路径。

intent: operator compares OCPP protocol versions for EV chargers

title.en: OCPP 1.6J vs OCPP 2.0.1 for EV Chargers

description.en: Compare OCPP 1.6J and OCPP 2.0.1 by platform compatibility, security, smart charging, device management, migration risk, and procurement priorities.
description.zh: 从平台兼容性、安全、智能充电、设备管理、迁移风险和采购优先级比较OCPP 1.6J与OCPP 2.0.1。

hero.en: OCPP 1.6J remains widely deployed and practical for many commercial projects, while OCPP 2.0.1 adds stronger device management and security capabilities. The right choice depends on backend readiness.
hero.zh: OCPP 1.6J仍被广泛部署，适合许多商用项目；OCPP 2.0.1增强了设备管理和安全能力。选择取决于后台平台是否准备好。

body.en: Many operators still choose OCPP 1.6J because it is broadly supported by CMS platforms and is easier to validate during pilots.
body.zh: 许多运营商仍选择OCPP 1.6J，因为主流CMS广泛支持，试点验证也更容易。

body.en: OCPP 2.0.1 can support richer device management, security profiles, transaction handling, and future smart charging scenarios when the backend supports it.
body.zh: 当后台支持时，OCPP 2.0.1可支持更丰富的设备管理、安全配置、交易处理和未来智能充电场景。

body.en: Buyers should request a protocol test with the target CMS before mass production, especially for authorization, meter values, remote start, and fault handling.
body.zh: 采购方应在量产前用目标CMS做协议测试，尤其验证授权、计量值、远程启动和故障处理。

intent: buyer researches EV charger certification needs for Europe and UK

title.en: EV Charger Certifications: CE, UKCA, IEC, MID, and OCPP

description.en: A buyer-focused guide to EV charger certification planning for Europe, the UK, and export projects, including CE, UKCA, IEC, MID metering, and OCPP validation.
description.zh: 面向采购方的充电桩出口认证规划指南，覆盖欧洲、英国项目常见的CE、UKCA、IEC、MID计量和OCPP验证。

hero.en: Certification planning should start before sample approval. The same charger family may require different documentation, test reports, labels, meters, and firmware settings for different export markets.
hero.zh: 认证规划应在样品确认前开始。同一充电桩系列面向不同出口市场，可能需要不同文件、测试报告、标签、电表和固件设置。

body.en: Meter type, leakage protection, enclosure rating, cable specification, labeling, and documentation can all change based on the target compliance path.
body.zh: 电表类型、漏电保护、防护等级、线缆规格、标签和文件都可能因目标合规路径而变化。

body.en: When charging fees are calculated by measured energy, operators often need certified metering and transparent records to support billing confidence.
body.zh: 按电量收费的场景通常需要认证计量和透明记录，以支持计费可信度。

heading.en: OCPP is not a safety certificate

body.en: OCPP verifies communication behavior with management platforms. It should be planned together with safety, EMC, metering, and regional compliance.
body.zh: OCPP验证的是与管理平台的通信行为，应与安全、EMC、计量和区域合规一起规划。

intent: buyer researches dynamic load balancing for EV chargers

title.en: Dynamic Load Balancing for EV Chargers
title.zh: 电动汽车充电桩动态负载均衡

description.en: Learn how dynamic load balancing helps EV charging sites avoid overload, use available grid capacity, and support multiple chargers in homes and commercial locations.
description.zh: 了解动态负载均衡如何帮助家庭和商用充电站避免过载、利用现有电力容量并支持多台设备。

hero.en: Dynamic load balancing adjusts charging output based on available electrical capacity. It is useful when a site wants more chargers without immediately upgrading the grid connection.
hero.zh: 动态负载均衡会根据可用电力容量调节充电输出，适合希望增加充电设备但暂时不扩容电网的站点。

body.en: The system can reduce charger output when building load rises and restore charging power when capacity becomes available again.
body.zh: 当建筑负荷上升时，系统可降低充电输出；容量恢复后，再提高充电功率。

heading.en: Useful for homes and commercial sites

body.en: Home wallboxes, apartment parking, offices, and hotels can all benefit when charger quantity grows faster than electrical capacity.
body.zh: 当充电设备数量增长快于电力容量时，家用壁挂桩、公寓停车场、办公室和酒店都可受益。

body.en: Reliable load balancing needs accurate measurement, stable communication, and commissioning rules that installers can understand.
body.zh: 可靠负载均衡需要准确计量、稳定通信，以及安装人员能理解的调试规则。

intent: property buyer plans EV chargers for parking lots

title.zh: 停车场电动汽车充电桩方案

description.en: Plan EV chargers for parking lots by user dwell time, charger mix, access control, payment, cable management, power capacity, and future expansion.
description.zh: 按用户停留时间、设备组合、权限控制、支付、线缆管理、电力容量和未来扩展规划停车场充电桩。

hero.en: Parking lot charging projects should start with user behavior. Long-stay users can be served by AC chargers, while short-stay and high-turnover users may require DC fast charging.
hero.zh: 停车场充电项目应从用户行为出发。长停用户适合交流桩，短停和高周转用户可能需要直流快充。

body.en: Employees, residents, shoppers, visitors, and fleets all have different charging expectations, so one charger type rarely fits every parking lot.
body.zh: 员工、住户、购物者、访客和车队的充电预期不同，因此一种设备很难适配所有停车场。

body.en: RFID, QR code payment, operator platforms, metering, and parking system integration should be discussed before selecting hardware.
body.zh: RFID、扫码支付、运营平台、计量和停车系统集成都应在选型前确认。

body.en: Conduit, cabinet space, load balancing, and backend capacity should be planned so the site can add chargers later without redesign.
body.zh: 线管、配电柜空间、负载均衡和后台容量应预留，方便后续增加设备而不重新设计。

intent: fleet operator plans depot or route charging

description.en: Plan EV chargers for fleet depots and route operations by vehicle schedule, power demand, uptime, charging speed, load control, and operational visibility.
description.zh: 按车辆班次、功率需求、可用率、充电速度、负载控制和运营可视化规划车队场站与路线充电。

hero.en: Fleet charging is operationally different from public charging. The goal is not only fast charging, but predictable vehicle readiness, charger uptime, and controlled energy cost.
hero.zh: 车队充电不同于公共充电，目标不仅是速度，还包括车辆按时出勤、设备可用率和可控能源成本。

body.en: Daily mileage, return time, parking duration, battery size, and route urgency determine whether AC, compact DC, or high-power DC is needed.
body.zh: 日行驶里程、返场时间、停放时长、电池容量和路线紧急程度决定需要交流、紧凑直流还是大功率直流。

body.en: Fleet depots often create concentrated charging peaks. Load control and staged charging can reduce grid stress and improve cost predictability.
body.zh: 车队场站常产生集中充电高峰。负载控制和分阶段充电可降低电网压力并提高成本可预测性。

body.en: Remote diagnostics, modular components, service access, and spare-part planning matter because charger downtime can disrupt vehicle dispatch.
body.zh: 远程诊断、模块化部件、维护通道和备件计划很重要，因为设备停机会影响车辆调度。

intent: hotel or destination property plans guest EV charging

title.en: EV Chargers for Hotels and Destination Charging
title.zh: 酒店与目的地充电桩方案

description.en: Plan EV chargers for hotels, resorts, and destination properties by guest dwell time, branding, payment, installation location, and service expectations.
description.zh: 按住客停留时间、品牌形象、支付、安装位置和服务预期规划酒店、度假村和目的地充电。

hero.en: Hotels usually need reliable, easy-to-use AC charging for overnight guests, with optional DC charging for premium service or high-turnover destination stops.
hero.zh: 酒店通常需要稳定易用的交流桩服务过夜住客，也可为高端服务或高周转目的地配置直流快充。

body.en: Charging should be simple to start, clearly priced if paid, well signposted, and reliable enough to avoid front-desk complaints.
body.zh: 充电流程应简单，收费时价格清晰，现场标识明确，并具备足够可靠性，避免增加前台投诉。

heading.en: AC is often the base layer

body.en: Because hotel guests often park overnight, 7KW to 22KW AC wallboxes or pedestals can meet many destination charging needs.
body.zh: 由于酒店住客常过夜停车，7KW至22KW交流壁挂或立柱设备可满足许多目的地充电需求。

body.en: Color, logo, signage, cable storage, and screen options can help the charging area match the property's brand experience.
body.zh: 颜色、Logo、标识、线缆收纳和屏幕选项可帮助充电区匹配酒店品牌体验。

intent: operator plans a DC fast charging site

title.en: DC Fast Charger Site Planning Guide
title.zh: 直流快充站点规划指南

description.en: Plan a DC fast charging site by grid capacity, charger power, connector mix, traffic flow, parking layout, backend integration, maintenance, and expansion.
description.zh: 按电网容量、设备功率、接口组合、车流、停车布局、后台对接、维护和扩容规划直流快充站点。

hero.en: A DC fast charging site is a power, traffic, and operations project. Hardware selection should follow grid study, vehicle demand, parking flow, and business model assumptions.
hero.zh: 直流快充站点是电力、交通和运营项目。硬件选型应基于电网评估、车辆需求、停车动线和商业模式假设。

body.en: Available transformer capacity, peak demand charges, cable runs, cabinet location, and expansion limits shape the practical charger power range.
body.zh: 可用变压器容量、峰值需量费、线缆距离、配电柜位置和扩容限制会决定实际可用功率范围。

body.en: Cable reach, parking bay angle, queue space, screen visibility, and service vehicle access affect user experience and maintenance efficiency.
body.zh: 线缆可达性、车位角度、排队空间、屏幕可视性和维护车辆通道会影响用户体验和维护效率。

body.en: Payment, monitoring, remote diagnostics, pricing, fault escalation, spare modules, and support roles should be defined before the site opens.
body.zh: 支付、监控、远程诊断、定价、故障升级、备件模块和支持角色应在站点开放前明确。
